description: Create a two-column content slide on major efficiency levers over time, with a left-side horizontal process flow timeline and right-side expert quote bullet list.

header.kicker: 3. Digital Transformation – The digital economy is here
header.headline: … and has the potential to raise efficiency to the next level across industries

steps.label: Business process reengineering/management
steps.sub: Analysis and design of business processes within an organization to reduce non-value-adding work

steps.label: Business process outsourcing/offshoring
steps.sub: Outsourcing of operations and responsibilities to service providers in countries with lower labor costs

steps.label: Business process automation
steps.sub: Automation of business processes using software robots

items.text: “Today artificial intelligence is where the internet was in 1996”
“What can these things do? We don’t really know the limits. It has incredible possibilities. I think it’s impossible to forecast accurately”
“Every aspect of our lives will be transformed. In short, success in creating AI could be the biggest event in the history of our civilization”
items.sub: Stephen Hawking – theoretical physicist and cosmologist
